opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a huge, hard lump on the back of my thigh that throbs constantly. I can't sit down at all, and I feel hot and sick.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A rapidly growing, very painful lump on my thigh, now with fever and feeling unwell.

symptom_narrative.onset: small tender red bump 5 days ago
symptom_narrative.character: firm, hot, throbbing lump with a yellow-white tip
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: low-grade fever, feeling hot and unwell

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurrent boils/staph skin infections; had an MRSA swab a couple of years ago

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no current antibiotics or regular medicines

communication_style.typical_message_style: in pain, focused on the lump

objective_data_offered.value: a 4 cm hot, red, very tender lump on the back of the thigh with a soft yellow-white pointing tip and redness spreading a few cm around it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot palpate fluctuance or depth
